title: Bacterial Transformation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"71mi9","text":"This protocol explains how to transform a plasmid DNA template into competent bacterial cells which are then cultivated. The DNA is then purified from the cells using a miniprep kit.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4htet","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e61fh","text":"The competent cells used in this protocol come from the NEB®10-beta Competent E. coli  kit. This protocol was adapted from the one provided with the cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":59,"length":1},{"style":"italic","offset":78,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"7higd","text":"Materials required","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"288s5","text":"a tube of NEB 10-beta Competent E. coli cells","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":32,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e5a09","text":"1-5 µl containing 1 pg-100 ng plasmid DNA template","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bm59n","text":"selection plates with appropriate antibiotic","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2ghue","text":"DNA miniprep kit","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2g19c","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Thaw a tube of NEB 10-beta Competent E. coli cells on ice for 10 minutes
Add 1-5 µl containing 1 pg-100 ng of plasmid DNA to the cell mixture. Flick the tube 4-5 times to mix cells and DNA but do not vortex.
Place the mixture on ice for 30 minutes. Do not mix.
Heat shock at exactly 42°C for exactly 30 seconds. Do not mix.
Place on ice for 5 minutes. Do not mix.
Pipette 950 µl of room temperature NEB 10-beta/Stable Outgrowth Medium into the mixture.
Place at 37°C for 60 minutes. Shake vigorously (250 rpm) or rotate.
Spread 50-100 µl of each dilution onto a selection plate and incubate overnight at 37°C. Alternatively, incubate at 30°C for 24-36 hours or 25°C for 48 hours.
Purify the DNA from selected cultures using a DNA miniprep kit
creator: Dana Mozaffari
